mapper.insert: INSERT INTO test_task (id, code, entrustment_id, orderer, order_time, required_completion_time, team_id, receiver, receive_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{code}, #{entrustmentId}, #{orderer}, #{orderTime}, #{requiredCompletionTime}, #{teamId}, #{receiver}, #{receiveTime})
mapper.select: SELECT t1.id, IFNULL(t1.task_code, t1.code) code, t1.orderer, t1.order_time, t1.required_completion_time, t2.count_price cost, t2.sampling_method, t2.check_purpose, t2.present_information, t2.file_url, t3.sample_id, t4.sample_name, t4.product_id, t4.sample_code, t4.specs, t4.batch_number, t4.generation, t4.sample_groups, t4.quantity_per_group, t4.sample_origin, t4.manufacturer, t4.received_date, t4.inspector, t4.sample_requirement, t4.outward, t4.picture, t5.check_item_id, t8.check_item_name, t5.method_id, t7.name, t5.standard_id, CONCAT(t6.code, '《', t6.`name`, '》') standard_name, t5.times, t5.unit_price, t5.id AS itemId FROM test_task t1 LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_info t2 ON t1.entrustment_id = t2.id LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_details_rel t3 ON t2.id = t3.entrustment_id LEFT JOIN test_sample t4 ON t3.sample_id = t4.id LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel t5 ON t1.entrustment_id = t5.entrust_id AND t4.id = t5.sample_id LEFT JOIN test_standard_file t6 ON t5.standard_id = t6.id LEFT JOIN test_method t7 ON t5.method_id = t7.id left join test_product_item t8 on t5.check_item_id = t8.check_item_id where t1.id = #{taskId}

SELECT t1.id taskId, IFNULL(t1.task_code, t1.CODE) taskCode, t1.required_completion_time requiredTime, t1.receive_time receiveTime, t4.sample_name sampleName, t4.id sampleId, t4.sample_code sampeCode, t4.batch_number batchNumber, t4.picture FROM test_task t1 LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_info t2 ON t1.entrustment_id = t2.id LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_details_rel t3 ON t2.id = t3.entrustment_id LEFT JOIN test_sample t4 ON t3.sample_id = t4.id WHERE t1.state = 1
and t1.code LIKE CONCAT('%',#{taskCode},'%')
and t4.sample_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{sampleName},'%')
and str_to_date( t1.receive_time, '%Y-%m-%d' ) >= str_to_date( #{beginDate}, '%Y-%m-%d' )
and str_to_date( t1.receive_time, '%Y-%m-%d' ) <= str_to_date( #{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d' )

SELECT DISTINCT t1.id taskId, IFNULL( t1.task_code, t1.CODE ) taskCode, t1.required_completion_time requiredCompletionTime, t1.inspector, t2.count_price cost, t4.sample_name sampleName, t4.product_id, t1.state FROM test_task t1 LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_info t2 ON t1.entrustment_id = t2.id LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_sample_details_rel t3 ON t2.id = t3.entrustment_id LEFT JOIN test_sample t4 ON t3.sample_id = t4.id LEFT JOIN test_team t5 ON t1.team_id = t5.id
and t1.code LIKE CONCAT('%',#{taskCode},'%')
and t4.sample_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{sampleName},'%')
and t1.state=#{state}
SELECT id, code, start_detection_time, end_detection_time, state FROM test_task WHERE id = #{taskId}
SELECT t1.id AS id, t1.code AS code FROM test_team AS t1 LEFT JOIN test_user_team_rel AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.team_id WHERE t2.user_id = #{userid}

SELECT t4.name AS label, t4.name AS value FROM test_team AS t1 LEFT JOIN test_user_team_rel AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.team_id LEFT JOIN sys_user AS t3 ON t3.user_id = t2.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_ding_user AS t4 ON t3.user_id = t4.userid WHERE 1=1 and t1.id = #{id} and t4.name is not NULL
SELECT t2.id, t2.project_name, t2.project_part FROM test_task t1 LEFT JOIN test_entrusted_info t2 ON t1.entrustment_id = t2.id where t1.id = #{taskId}

SELECT t2.`name` FROM (SELECT * FROM test_entrusted_sample_checkitem_rel WHERE check_item_id = #{checkItemId} AND entrust_id = #{entrustId} AND sample_id = #{sampleId}) t1 LEFT JOIN test_standard_file t2 ON t1.standard_id = t2.id

SELECT CONCAT(t2.CODE, "《", t2.`name`, "》") FROM (SELECT standard_id FROM test_entrusted_sample_standard_rel WHERE sample_id = #{sampleId} AND entrustment_id = #{entrustId}) t1 LEFT JOIN test_standard_file t2 ON t1.standard_id = t2.id
